'''Quintama''' was [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Melida Liberation Force]] just before the [[Twenty-First Battle of Zehava]], in which he was killed. Quintama was the husband of [[Pinani]] and father of [[Renei]] and [[Wunana]]. A [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] of Quintama recorded the day before the Twenty-First Battle of Zehava appeared in the [[Hall of Evidence]] on [[Melida/Daan/Legends|Melida/Daan]].
